title: phebalium nottii
intro: Phebalium nottii, also known as the Tasmanian pepper bush, is a shrub native to the island of Tasmania in Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of Phebalium nottii lie in its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, colds, and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Phebalium nottii are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
